description_long: This is a three-story commercial building with a muted blue-gray facade and a flat roofline, featuring a decorative cornice at the top. The ground floor houses a clothing store with a large display window on the left, a recessed entrance, and a secondary door to the right, both framed in black and white trim. The upper two floors have six evenly spaced sash windows with brown trim, giving the building a symmetrical appearance. The storefront signage reads 'NIMAGIN' above the right entrance, and the display window showcases various items, including a mannequin and decorative elements. The building's exterior is primarily smooth plaster or painted concrete, with some visible wear and urban character. The overall style is minimalist with subtle modern influences, typical of urban retail architecture.
description: A three-story blue-gray commercial building with a clothing store on the ground floor, featuring a large display window, recessed entrance, and minimalist urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full facade, including the display window, main entrance, signage, and all upper windows.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the building's extreme thinness and flatness, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view similar to the front, but with the signage partially obscured and the display window less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the building's thinness and the protruding entrance structure.
attribute_storefront_signage: Rectangular white sign above the right entrance with black text reading 'NIMAGIN', simple sans-serif font.
attribute_display_windows: One large rectangular display window on the left side of the storefront, featuring visible items and decorations.
attribute_mannequins: One mannequin visible in the display window, positioned upright and dressed in clothing.
